verdict_reason: Tags on BG 2.8 are judgment-under-uncertainty, incident-response, strategic-frame. Coherent with 2.6 (judgment-under-uncertainty + strategic-frame) and 2.7 (judgment-under-uncertainty) — the three verses 2.6/2.7/2.8 form a coherent diagnostic→surrender→limit-naming arc on judgment-under-uncertainty without contradicting each other. The strategic-frame tag is shared with 2.6 and the doctrines align: both name moments where the operator must report a frame-level limit rather than continue making moves inside the frame. The incident-response tag is verse-8-specific (the platform-reliability scenario) and may need to be cross-checked against later verses. No cross_references[] declared. PASS.
